tests.name: test_content_hash_not_shared_across_splits
tests.verifies: Duplicate files stay in a single split

tests.name: test_evaluate_gate_blocks_test_by_default
tests.verifies: Test evaluation is blocked unless ALLOW_TEST_EVAL=true

tests.name: test_kaggle_test_dir_not_in_manifest
tests.verifies: Unlabeled Kaggle test images are excluded from manifest
tests.why_it_matters: Keeps unlabeled data out of labeled split logic

tests.name: test_manifest_exists_after_split
tests.verifies: Manifest exists with valid split column
tests.why_it_matters: Ensures pipeline metadata is complete before training

tests.name: test_processed_paths_under_processed_dir
tests.why_it_matters: Prevents accidental training from raw data paths

tests.name: test_split_disjointness
tests.verifies: No image_id appears in more than one split
tests.why_it_matters: Prevents the same image from being in train and test

tests.name: test_splits_json_matches_manifest
tests.why_it_matters: Ensures reporting and materialized splits are consistent

tests.name: test_stratification_within_tolerance
tests.verifies: Cat/dog ratio is similar across train, val, and test
tests.why_it_matters: Prevents biased splits that distort evaluation
